description: Fix all critical and high-priority security/code quality issues: auth middleware, hardcoded secrets, OpenAI key validation, race condition in stock update, fire-and-forget embedding logging, execSync replacement
steps: Create src/lib/auth.ts - export a function requireAuth(request: NextRequest) that reads the x-admin-token header and validates against process.env.ADMIN_SECRET. If ADMIN_SECRET env var is missing in production (NODE_ENV==='production'), throw an error at module load time. In development, allow a fallback but log a warning. Return NextResponse with 401 if unauthorized, or null if authorized.

Update src/app/api/agent/approval/route.ts - remove the hardcoded fallback 'dev-admin-token'. Instead at the top level: if NODE_ENV is production and ADMIN_SECRET is not set, throw. In development, use a logged warning fallback. Also wrap JSON.parse(queueItem.actionPayload) in try-catch for issue #12.

Update src/lib/langchain/config.ts - in getOpenAIConfig() and getEmbeddingConfig(), validate that OPENAI_API_KEY is set. If not set, throw an Error with a descriptive message rather than returning empty string.

Fix src/lib/langchain/tools/update-stock.ts - move the findUnique check and the OUT quantity validation INSIDE the $transaction callback to prevent race conditions. The transaction should do: findUnique -> validate -> create movement -> update item, all within the same transaction.

Fix src/app/api/knowledge/route.ts - improve the fire-and-forget embedding error logging to include the knowledge entry ID for traceability. Change from console.error('Failed to generate embedding:', err) to console.error(`[Embedding] Failed to generate embedding for knowledge entry ${entry.id}:`, err). Add a comment about future retry mechanism.

Refactor src/lib/agent-guard/runner.ts - replace all execSync calls with async alternatives. Make all runner functions async (runGuardInput, runGuardOutput, runKnowledgeAudit, runSkillScan) using child_process.execFile with util.promisify or spawn. Keep the same fallback-to-TypeScript behavior. Also make isPolyglotAvailable async.

Apply auth middleware to ALL unprotected API routes by adding the requireAuth check at the start of each handler: src/app/api/stok/route.ts, src/app/api/knowledge/route.ts, src/app/api/follow-up/route.ts, src/app/api/follow-up/[id]/route.ts, src/app/api/customers/route.ts, src/app/api/feedback/route.ts, src/app/api/feedback/templates/route.ts, src/app/api/pengaturan/route.ts, src/app/api/pengaturan/agent-guard/route.ts, src/app/api/pengaturan/categories/route.ts, src/app/api/pengaturan/channels/route.ts, src/app/api/chat/route.ts, src/app/api/chat/[conversationId]/route.ts. For each file, import requireAuth from @/lib/auth and add at the top of each exported handler: const authError = requireAuth(request); if (authError) return authError;
acceptance_criteria: src/lib/auth.ts exists and exports requireAuth function
All API routes return 401 when no valid x-admin-token header is provided
ADMIN_SECRET without env var throws in production mode
getOpenAIConfig() throws if OPENAI_API_KEY is not set
Stock update tool does findUnique + validation inside the transaction
Knowledge route logs entry ID on embedding failure
runner.ts functions are async and use execFile/spawn instead of execSync
JSON.parse in approval route is wrapped in try-catch
Project still builds successfully with npx next build
